title: Molasses Cookies
body:
Lydia Maria Child published the original frugal-housewife philosophy: nothing wasted, everything beautiful. The cookies hold up.

· ¾ cup butter, softened
· 1 cup sugar
· ¼ cup molasses
· 1 egg
· 2 cups flour
· 2 teaspoons baking soda
· 1 teaspoon each: cinnamon, ginger
· ½ teaspoon cloves
· ¼ teaspoon salt
· Sugar for rolling

source.label: Lydia Maria Child · The American Frugal Housewife · 1829
source.ref: Lydia Maria Child · The American Frugal Housewife · 1829
